hero.title: Got Questions? We've Got Answers
hero.subheading: Find answers to common questions about our services, process, and partnership models.

faqs.question: What is your typical engagement process?
faqs.answer: Our process begins with a deep-dive discovery phase to align on goals. We then move into agile development cycles featuring bi-weekly demos, transparent roadmaps, and continuous feedback loops to ensure alignment at every step.

faqs.question: Who owns the intellectual property?
faqs.answer: Upon completion and final payment, you retain 100% ownership of all source code, designs, and intellectual property generated during the engagement.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build an MVP?
faqs.answer: A typical MVP takes between 12 to 20 weeks depending on complexity, integrations, and feature scope.

faqs.question: What technology stack do you use?
faqs.answer: We specialize in modern, scalable stacks including React/Next.js for frontend, Node.js or Python for backend, and PostgreSQL for databases, hosted on AWS or GCP.

faqs.question: How do you handle data security?
faqs.answer: We implement industry-standard security practices including encryption at rest and in transit, regular security audits, and compliance with data protection regulations.

faqs.question: What support do you provide after launch?
faqs.answer: We offer SLA-backed maintenance packages, ongoing feature iteration cycles, and proactive infrastructure monitoring to ensure your product scales seamlessly.

cta.title: Still Have Questions?
cta.subtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is here to help.

sections.title: Overview
content: Crestcode USA ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal data. This Privacy Policy outlines types of information we collect, how we use it, and measures we take to protect it when you use our website and services.

By accessing or using our services, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy. We may update this policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements.

sections.title: Data Collection & Usage
content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, fill out a form, or communicate with our support team. This may include:
listItems: Contact Information: Name, email address, phone number, and mailing address.
Professional Details: Job title, company name, and industry information.
Technical Usage: IP address, browser type, and operating system details.
followUpContent: We use this data to provide and improve our services, process transactions, send administrative updates, and ensure compliance with security protocols.

sections.title: Cookies & Analytics
content: Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze site traffic.

cookies.title: ESSENTIAL COOKIES
cookies.description: Necessary for the website to function properly, including security and session management.

cookies.title: ANALYTICS COOKIES
cookies.description: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website through tools like Google Analytics.

sections.cookieNote: You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings at any time.

sections.title: Contact Information
content: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or how we handle your personal data, please contact our Data Protection Officer:

founders.title: For Founders

support.title: Support
support.description: We provide foundational support for existing teams, augmenting capabilities where you need them most.
support.bestFor: Teams needing specific technical or design expertise to accelerate delivery.

codevelopment.title: Co-Development
codevelopment.description: We work alongside your internal team in a shared codebase, accelerating roadmap delivery.
codevelopment.bestFor: Scaling startups that need to move fast without immediate full-time hires.

fullBuild.title: Full Build
fullBuild.description: We handle the entire product lifecycle from ideation to deployment as your dedicated product organization.
fullBuild.bestFor: Solo founders or non-technical teams needing an end-to-end build partner.

cards.title: 1. Building Before Validation
cards.problemDesc: We identify high-potential opportunities, validate them through strategy and market fit, and build scalable ventures with the right product, team, and capital.
cards.solutionDesc: Crestcode validates ideas before development begins, tests demand and feasibility early, aligns the solution with real market needs, and ensures execution starts with confidence, not guesswork.

cards.title: 2. Technical Foundation
cards.problemDesc: Startups often suffer from poor technical foundations that prevent scaling and lead to expensive rewrites.
cards.solutionDesc: We build on enterprise-grade architecture from day one, ensuring your product is scalable, secure, and ready for massive growth.

cards.title: 3. Market Misalignment
cards.problemDesc: Most startups fail because they build products no one wants, misinterpreting market signals.
cards.solutionDesc: Our validation process savings crucial runway by preventing premature scaling and ensuring resources are allocated to proven market demands.

cards.title: 4. Execution Speed
cards.problemDesc: Fragmented handoffs between design and engineering slow down development and dilute vision.
cards.solutionDesc: Our dedicated pods move 10x faster through total alignment, shared codebases, and repeatable engineering frameworks.

cards.title: 5. Capital Efficiency
cards.problemDesc: Raising too much capital too early leads to dilution and loss of strategic control.
cards.solutionDesc: We provide the infrastructure and expertise to reach profitability with minimal burn, giving founders total control.

whyIdeasFail.title: Why 90% of Ideas Never Launch.
whyIdeasFail.description: Most startups fail because they build products no one wants, run out of capital before finding product-market fit, or suffer from poor technical foundations that prevent scaling.

problems.title: Building in Isolation
problems.description: Developing without continuous user feedback leads to misaligned products.

problems.title: Premature Scaling
problems.description: Spending heavily on marketing before achieving true product-market fit.

whatWeLookFor.title: What We Look For
whatWeLookFor.subtitle: We are highly selective. Our resources are finite, which is why we only partner with ventures that meet our "Future-Standard" criteria.

criteria.title: Market Scale
criteria.description: We look for ideas targeting massive TAM ($1B+) with clear, underserved niches or significant market inefficiencies.

criteria.title: Technical Edge
criteria.description: Opportunities where AI, intelligent automation, or proprietary technology creates a sustainable competitive advantage.

criteria.title: High Conviction
criteria.description: Ideas that solve critical, recurring pain points with a clear path to product-market fit and scalability.

criteria.title: Founder Fit
criteria.description: Partners who possess deep domain expertise, relentless drive, and a commitment to professional-grade execution.

timeline.title: The Build Timeline
timeline.subtitle: A high-velocity, structured roadmap from zero to market entry. We engineer digital excellence through 6 rigorous execution phases, optimized for performance and scale.

phases.title: Discovery Requirements
phases.description: Defining core goals and user needs for a scalable architecture.

phases.title: Design & Prototyping
phases.description: High-fidelity UI/UX design and interaction mapping.

phases.title: Agile Development
phases.description: Building core features with bi-weekly demos.

sections.title: Agreement to Terms
content: By accessing or using the Crestcode USA website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
We reserve the right to review and amend any of these terms at our sole discretion. Any change will take effect from the date of publication.

sections.title: Service Limitations
content: Our services are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding the accuracy, reliability, or availability of the website or its content.
